sentences.english: I went to the supermarket with my mom after school.
We bought milk eggs bread and some fruit.
sentences.korean: 우유 달걀 빵 그리고 과일을 좀 샀어요.

sentences.english: I helped carry the heavy bags to the car.
sentences.korean: 무거운 봉지를 차까지 나르는 것을 도왔어요.

sentences.english: Mom let me choose one snack as a reward.
sentences.korean: 엄마가 보상으로 간식 하나를 고르게 해줬어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
